---
title: "Group 3 Report Presentation"
subtitle: "Impact of Instructor Encouragement on Students’ Perceived Value of Research Participation"
author: "Raymond Marquez"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: beige
    slide-number: true
    toc: true
    transition: slide
execute:
  echo: true
---

## Data Wrangling & Final Sample

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(purrr)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)

# Load data
data <- read_sav("RPE - Combined-2019-12-19.sav")

data_clean <- data %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    valu_worth_time = as.numeric(valu_worth_time),
    valu_worth_effo = as.numeric(valu_worth_effo),
    value_all_bus = as.numeric(value_all_bus),
    incentive_prime = as.factor(incentive_prime)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(incentive_prime, valu_worth_time, valu_worth_effo)

# Create composite DV
data_clean <- data_clean %>%
  mutate(
    value_index = rowMeans(
      select(., valu_worth_time, valu_worth_effo, value_all_bus),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )
#visualization
data_clean %>%
  group_by(incentive_prime) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(value_index, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = incentive_prime, y = mean_value, fill = incentive_prime)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Perceived Value by Instructor Encouragement",
    x = "Instructor Encouragement Type",
    y = "Mean Value Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#deeper insight
ggplot(data_clean, aes(x = incentive_prime, y = value_index, fill = incentive_prime)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Perceived Value by Encouragement Type",
    x = "Instructor Encouragement",
    y = "Value Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


#modelling

model <- lm(value_index ~ incentive_prime, data = data_clean)
summary(model)
```
